author: @smokyatgroups
text: Nice idea...it'd be good to store the dc current through the coil in a  cap & then recycle it again,   your setup is very similar to Lester Hendershot early implementation of his free energy device ..he connected the spring of the free oscillating mass to an antenna. The diagram is in Lindsay Hendershots notes.

author: @EmmittBrownBTTF1
text: It's not really amplifying. with the magnets in place more current is drawn from the battery increasing the input and wattage output wattage.
